arts.ttl: Croatia vs France: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing France's UEFA Nations League quarter-final first leg with Croatia, including team news, how to watch and score prediction.

arts.ttl: A victory over Croatia would be a good omen for France
arts.sum: Before the 1998 World Cup semi-finals, they had never met on the international stage, but they’ve built up a solid rivalry since then. For over 20 years, France and Croatia…

arts.ttl: France’s Theo Hernandez trains seperately ahead of Croatia tie
arts.sum: France trained in Split tonight ahead of tomorrow’s UEFA Nations League quarter-final first leg against Croatia, however, they did so without Theo Hernandez (27). The defender, as well as centre-back…

arts.ttl: France predicted XI v Croatia: William Saliba and Ibrahima Konaté to start
arts.sum: France face Croatia this Thursday at Split for the UEFA Nations League quarter-finals first leg. The return leg is set to be played this Sunday at Saint-Denis’ Stade de France.…

arts.ttl: Mbappé accepts past mistakes as France captain
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé returns to lead France against Croatia after a six-month absence and on Wednesday criticized himself over how he handled the captaincy before.

arts.ttl: Nations League: Predictions for all 12 games on Thursday
arts.sum: James Mason has looked over all 12 Nations League games taking place on Thursday and picked out a score prediction for each match.

arts.ttl: France’s answer to Kobbie Mainoo: The teen GENIUS making the Premier League dream
arts.sum: Lille’s Ayyoub Bouaddi has emerged as one of the most promising midfielders in the world this season, with the 17-year-old’s performances attracting interest from some of Europe’s biggest clubs. SciSports compares Bouaddi in style to Manchester United midfielder Kobbie Mainoo, who has already won England honours, yet at 17, the Franco-Moroccan star is matching what his older counterpart has achieved at Old Trafford and is ready to explode onto the big stage.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé would be ‘extremely happy’ to see ‘idol’ Zinédine Zidane appointed France manager
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé (26) has said that it would be a “great pleasure” if Zinédine Zidane was named manager of the Franc national team, whilst once again distancing himself from the decision-making process…

arts.ttl: How Olivier Giroud is Performing in MLS for LAFC
arts.sum: American media have been left far from impressed by Olivier Giroud after his first seven months in the MLS.
